choose a throne:

Event: Summer Festival 2026
Event Date: 01/06/2026
Sage Bot Item Code: AR414
Blue Steel Plate Mail

When the unit receives 650000 damage, they restore 325000 health; their damage, fortitude, physical and magic armor are increased by 25% for 5 sec. Stacks up to 5 times. The unit also deals physical damage equal to 110% of own physical armor to 3 random enemy units, and has a 65% chance to turn the targets into rocks for 3 sec. For that duration, the targets are unable to move, and take 45% more damage. The targets also receive 731000 magic damage every second for the duration. When the
effect wears off, the targets explode. The explosion deals 650000 pure damage to the targets; their physical and magic armor are reduced by 25% for 5 sec. Rocks are also launched at 2 nearest enemy units. The rocks deal 813000 physical damage on impact and stun the targets for 2 sec. The ability triggers at most once every 2 sec.

Requirements: 98-100
